entities.name: NETWORKING

entities.name: CLAN

entities.description: The geographical region where CLAN and the Working Group on Nitrogen Fixing Legumes operate

entities.name: WORKING GROUPS
entities.description: Groups of scientists within networks interested in finding quick solutions to regional priority problems

entities.description: A specific working group focused on nitrogen-fixing legumes within the Asian region

entities.name: PRODUCTION CONSTRAINTS
